component.name: CosmicSnip
component.summary: Screenshot snipping tool for COSMIC Desktop

description.p: CosmicSnip is a Windows Snipping Tool clone built natively for the COSMIC Desktop Environment on Pop!_OS 24.04 and other Wayland desktops.

ul.li: Instant fullscreen capture with drag-to-select region
Annotation tools: pen, highlighter, arrow, rectangle
Copy to clipboard with a single keystroke (Ctrl+C)
Save As dialog with full path control (Ctrl+S)
Multi-monitor aware — snip from any display

description.p: Overlay reliability update, security hardening, and documentation polish.
First stable release with multi-monitor selection overlays and annotation editor.
Security hardening and multi-monitor support improvements.
Initial release. Core capture, annotation, clipboard, and save features.
